proteins: Steak, ribeye or strip (1 lb) - fresh cook

timeline.title: Slow Cooker + Prep
tasks: Slow cooker pulled pork: Pat 4-5 lb pork shoulder dry. Rub with salt, pepper, garlic powder, paprika, cumin. Place fat-side up, add 1/2 cup water. LOW 8-10 hours.
Season chicken thighs: Pat dry (crucial for crispy skin). Toss with olive oil, salt, pepper, garlic powder, paprika.
Form beef patties: Divide 2 lbs ground beef into 8 patties (4 oz each). Season, refrigerate.
Start bacon: Lay 1 lb on sheet pan, 400°F for 20 min.

timeline.title: Sheet Pans + Eggs
tasks: Sheet pan 1 - Chicken: Arrange thighs skin-side up, not touching. 400°F for 40-45 min until skin is golden. Internal temp 175°F.
Sheet pan 2 - Broccoli & Brussels: Toss with olive oil, salt, garlic powder. 400°F for 25-30 min, toss halfway.
Sheet pan 3 - Zucchini & Peppers: Cut zucchini into 1/2" rounds, peppers into strips. Olive oil, salt, Italian herbs. 400°F for 20-25 min.
Instant Pot eggs: 24 eggs on trivet, 1 cup water. High pressure 5 min, natural release 5 min, ice bath 5 min. Shells slide right off.

timeline.title: Cauliflower Mash + Raw Veggies
tasks: Cauliflower mash: Steam 2 heads until very tender (12-15 min). Drain WELL. Blend with 4 tbsp butter, 1/4 cup cream, salt, garlic.
Wash greens: Wash and dry mixed greens and spinach. Store with paper towel.
Cut raw veggies: Slice cucumber, celery, peppers for snacking. Store in water.
Wash berries: Rinse, dry, portion into containers.

timeline.title: Container Everything
tasks: Shred pulled pork: Remove from slow cooker, shred with forks. Return to liquid. Store in containers with some juice.
Portion proteins: Chicken thighs individually, eggs in 2s, bacon in portions.
Portion vegetables: Roasted veggies in meal-sized portions (~1 cup each).
Make dressing: 3/4 cup olive oil + 1/4 cup vinegar + 1 tsp Dijon + garlic + salt. Shake in jar.
Stack in fridge: Organize by protein type for easy assembly.

meal1.name: Classic Cobb Salad
ingredients: 1.5 cups pulled pork or shredded chicken
meal1.instructions: Arrange greens in bowl. Top with rows of protein, eggs, bacon, avocado, tomatoes, cheese. Drizzle dressing.

meal1.name: Pulled Pork Power Bowl
meal1.instructions: Warm pulled pork and cauliflower mash. Layer mash in bowl, top with pork, brussels, eggs, avocado. Add sauce.

meal1.name: Mediterranean Chicken Bowl
meal1.instructions: Slice chicken thighs. Arrange over greens with cucumber, tomatoes, olives, feta. Dress with olive oil and lemon.

meal1.name: Asian Pork Bowl
ingredients: 2 cups sauteed bok choy or cabbage
meal1.instructions: Warm pork with coconut aminos. Serve over bok choy with broccoli and eggs. Drizzle sesame oil, top with seeds.

meal1.name: Bacon & Egg Breakfast Salad
ingredients: 4 eggs (fry fresh or use hard boiled)
meal1.instructions: Warm greens slightly with hot bacon fat. Top with eggs, bacon, avocado, tomatoes. Drizzle oil, add hot sauce.

meal1.name: Taco Salad (No Shell)
ingredients: 8 oz ground beef with taco seasoning (or pulled pork)
meal1.instructions: Cook beef patty, crumble with cumin and chili powder (or use pulled pork). Serve over romaine with toppings.

meal2.name: Chicken Thigh Plate
meal2.instructions: Reheat chicken in 400°F oven 10 min to re-crisp skin. Warm brussels and mash. Plate, add butter to mash.

meal2.name: Pulled Pork Dinner
meal2.instructions: Warm pulled pork. Make quick slaw with shredded cabbage, mayo, splash of vinegar. Plate with brussels, bacon, pickles.

meal2.name: Double Burger Plate
ingredients: Lettuce wrap or bed of greens
meal2.instructions: Cook patties 4 min per side in cast iron. Add cheese last minute. Serve on greens with toppings and roasted zucchini.

meal2.name: Salmon with Asparagus
meal2.instructions: Season salmon, pan sear skin-down 4 min, flip 3 min. Roast asparagus with oil. Plate with butter, lemon, capers, eggs.

meal2.name: Steak Dinner
meal2.instructions: Bring steak to room temp. Sear in cast iron 4 min per side. Rest 5 min, top with butter. Serve with broccoli and spinach.

meal2.name: Bacon-Wrapped Chicken
meal2.instructions: Wrap each thigh with 2 strips raw bacon. Bake 400°F 35-40 min until bacon crispy. Serve with veggies and ranch.

snacks.name: Deviled Eggs (6 halves)
snacks.instructions: Halve eggs, mash yolks with mayo and mustard. Fill whites, dust with paprika.

snacks.name: Cheese & Veggie Plate
snacks.instructions: Slice cheese, arrange with veggies and olives.

snacks.name: Greek Yogurt + Berries
snacks.instructions: Top yogurt with berries and nuts.

snacks.name: Bacon & Avocado
snacks.instructions: Top avocado halves with crumbled bacon and seasoning.

snacks.name: Deli Roll-Ups
ingredients: 4 oz deli turkey or roast beef
snacks.instructions: Spread cream cheese on deli meat, roll around pickle.

snacks.name: Celery + Almond Butter
snacks.instructions: Spread almond butter in celery grooves.
